sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54137" key="katakeu/qomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατακεύθομαι</orth>, <sense id="n54137.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be hidden</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς δνοφερὸν τύμβον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.29</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Ignat.).</sense> </entryFree>
